body_txt: Ah, the loyal, lovable, non-human friend. For whatever reason these dutiful companions will follow their (usually) human friend just about anywhere. Sometimes it be magic, other times merely loyalty. In any event, everybody loves pets that know how to kick ass. Sub-Trope of Interspecies Friendship and Non-Human Sidekick . Despite the name, Morality Pet doesn't belong here. May or may not be a Talking Animal .
